nasb.text: He shall not eat an animal which dies or is torn by beasts, becoming unclean by it; I am the Lord.

esv.text: He shall not eat what dies of itself or is torn by beasts, and so make himself unclean by it: I am the Lord.’

cnv.text: 自死的或是野獸撕裂的動物，他都不可吃，免得玷污自己；我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 他不可吃自然死亡或被野兽撕裂的动物，否则就不洁净。我是耶和华。
